rules.name: Account Takeover via XSS + CSRF
rules.description: XSS enables unauthorized actions and CSRF gaps allow state-changing requests without user intent.

rules.name: Data Exfiltration via IDOR + Open Redirect
rules.description: IDOR and redirect flow abuse can be chained to expand unauthorized data access.

rules.name: Privilege Escalation via Mass Assignment + CSRF
rules.description: Mass assignment combined with CSRF weaknesses may elevate privileges silently.

rules.name: RCE via File Upload + Command Injection
rules.description: Unrestricted upload with command execution indicators suggests code execution chain.

rules.name: Internal Secret Exposure via SSRF + Secret Leak
rules.description: SSRF foothold combined with leaked secrets can expose internal resources.

rules.name: Fintech Account Takeover via XSS + CSRF
rules.description: Fintech programs prioritize XSS plus CSRF combinations that can trigger authenticated transfer or beneficiary changes.
